scores.correctness_notes: Complete and correct Pebble layer YAML covering all three required sections (services, checks, log-targets). All fields are accurate: override, startup, environment, on-check-failure linking, HTTP check with period/timeout/threshold, and Loki log target with services and labels. Uses 'alive' for level vs gold's 'ready' — both are valid options, and the agent even notes the distinction.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — on-success/on-failure are real Pebble service fields; description at layer level is valid; all other fields match the Pebble layer specification
